openFindings.title: Published dispatch recipes contradict the authoritative top-level agent contract
The sibling-boundary table directs OpenAI work to the wrong skill identity
Broad process kill can terminate unrelated operator-owned OpenCode sessions
Parallel-session quick-start publishes a session without the required confirmation gate
MCP cutover leaves a known authentication/configuration disagreement outside every release gate
Phase-003 graph scaffold precedes the required scorer atomic bundle
Relative cross-skill links lack a resolution-based move gate
Phase 006 scope boundary obscures its mcp-code-mode metadata exception
Parent phase map leaves phase-001 write boundary implicit

data.reason: STOP is blocked by 1 blocker(s): uncovered_dimensions

blockers.description: Dimension coverage (0%) is below threshold (80%). 0 gap(s) found. STOP is blocked until all required dimensions have meaningful coverage.

notes: Convergence signals were computed from the session-scoped subgraph only.

searchDebt.rationale: The target provides no runtime authentication evidence and intentionally excludes the configuration registration.
